title: Business Rates Relief: 2026 Supporting Small Business Relief, local authority guidance
body: "​At the 2025 Autumn Budget the Chancellor announced that the 2026 Supporting Small Business Relief scheme will cap bill increases at £800 per year or the relevant caps within transitional relief (whichever is the greatest) for any business losing eligibility for certain reliefs, including Small Business Rate Relief and Rural Rate Relief, and 40% Retail, Hospitality and Leisure Relief at the 2026 revaluation. "
